title: JJK-Pack
description: Enter The World of JJK. The JJK Pack Made By Notkushflayer
body:
# We offer You
- **Yuta okkotsu sword**
- **Gojo totem**
- **Custom spear**
- **Custom gaps**
- **Hollow purple windcharges**
- **Blue pearls**
- **Custom mace texture**
- **Custom end crystal**
- **Custom fire**
- **Black flash hit particles**
- **Low shield(i think)**
- **Blue webs**
- **Custom bow,rails,crossbow**
- **Clear water**
- **And custom mahoraga sword(neth)**
### [Join Our Discord Server By Clicking This](https://discord.gg/Ut7x6J47Ev)
